note: One-time recovery commit. The daily download-stats workflow failed every run from its inception (~2026-06-19) through 2026-06-24 due to an argv bug, so no going-forward snapshots were produced in that window. This file recovers what is recoverable: npm keeps full daily history (recovered in full below via the range API); GitHub keeps no historical download time-series, so only today cumulative per-asset totals are captured and the ~6-day daily-delta gap for GitHub releases is unrecoverable.
